001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.concurrent.*;
025
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml.*;
031
032/**
033 * Serializes POJOs to RDF.
034 *
035 * <h5 class='topic'>Behavior-specific subclasses</h5>
036 * <p>
037 * The following direct subclasses are provided for language-specific serializers:
038 * <ul>
039 *    <li>{@link RdfXmlSerializer} - RDF/XML.
040 *    <li>{@link RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer} - RDF/XML-ABBREV.
041 *    <li>{@link NTripleSerializer} - N-TRIPLE.
042 *    <li>{@link TurtleSerializer} - TURTLE.
043 *    <li>{@link N3Serializer} - N3.
044 * </ul>
045 *
046 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
047 *    <li class='note'>This class is thread safe and reusable.
048 * </ul>
049 *
050 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
051 *    <li class='link'>{doc jmr.RdfDetails}
052
053 * </ul>
054 */
055@SuppressWarnings({
056   "java:S100", // Builder methods use underscore-separated namespacing convention (e.g. n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri, rdfxml_xmlbase) to group related settings by Jena component
057   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth exceeds 5; necessary to participate in the serializer hierarchy
058   "java:S115"  // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase convention
059})
060public class RdfSerializer extends WriterSerializer implements RdfMetaProvider {
061
062   // Property name constants
063   private static final String PROP_addBeanTypes = "addBeanTypes";
064   private static final String PROP_addLiteralTypes = "addLiteralTypes";
065   private static final String PROP_addRootProperty = "addRootProperty";
066   private static final String PROP_autoDetectNamespaces = "autoDetectNamespaces";
067   private static final String PROP_collectionFormat = "collectionFormat";
068   private static final String PROP_juneauBpNs = "juneauBpNs";
069   private static final String PROP_juneauNs = "juneauNs";
070   private static final String PROP_language = "language";
071   private static final String PROP_looseCollections = "looseCollections";
072   private static final String PROP_namespaces = "namespaces";
073   private static final String PROP_useXmlNamespaces = "useXmlNamespaces";
074
075   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
076   private static final String ARG_value = "value";
077   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
078   private static final String ARG_values = "values";
079
080   // Media type and language constants
081   private static final String LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV = "RDF/XML-ABBREV";
082   private static final String MT_TEXT_XML_RDF = "text/xml+rdf";
083
084   /**
085    * Builder class.
086    */
087   @SuppressWarnings({
088      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
089   })
090   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends WriterSerializer.Builder<SELF> {
091
092      private static final Cache<HashKey,RdfSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, RdfSerializer.class).build();
093
094      private static final Namespace DEFAULT_JUNEAU_NS = Namespace.of("j", "http://www.apache.org/juneau/");
095      private static final Namespace DEFAULT_JUNEAUBP_NS = Namespace.of("jp", "http://www.apache.org/juneaubp/");
096
097      boolean addBeanTypesRdf;
098      boolean addLiteralTypes;
099      boolean addRootProperty;
100      boolean disableAutoDetectNamespaces;
101      boolean disableUseXmlNamespaces;
102      boolean looseCollections;
103      String language;
104      Namespace juneauNs;
105      Namespace juneauBpNs;
106      RdfCollectionFormat collectionFormat;
107      List<Namespace> namespaces;
108      Map<String,Object> jenaSettings;
109
110      /**
111       * Constructor, default settings.
112       */
113      protected Builder() {
114         super();
115         addBeanTypesRdf = env("Rdf.addBeanTypesRdf", false);
116         addLiteralTypes = env("Rdf.addLiteralTypes", false);
117         addRootProperty = env("Rdf.addRootProperty", false);
118         disableAutoDetectNamespaces = env("Rdf.disableAutoDetectNamespaces", false);
119         disableUseXmlNamespaces = env("Rdf.disableUseXmlNamespaces", false);
120         looseCollections = env("Rdf.looseCollections", false);
121         language = env("Rdf.language", LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV);
122         collectionFormat = env("Rdf.collectionFormat", RdfCollectionFormat.DEFAULT);
123         juneauNs = DEFAULT_JUNEAU_NS;
124         juneauBpNs = DEFAULT_JUNEAUBP_NS;
125         namespaces = null;
126         jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>();
127      }
128
129      /**
130       * Copy constructor.
131       *
132       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
133       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
134       */
135      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
136         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
137         addBeanTypesRdf = copyFrom.addBeanTypesRdf;
138         addLiteralTypes = copyFrom.addLiteralTypes;
139         addRootProperty = copyFrom.addRootProperty;
140         collectionFormat = copyFrom.collectionFormat;
141         disableAutoDetectNamespaces = copyFrom.disableAutoDetectNamespaces;
142         disableUseXmlNamespaces = copyFrom.disableUseXmlNamespaces;
143         juneauBpNs = copyFrom.juneauBpNs;
144         juneauNs = copyFrom.juneauNs;
145         language = copyFrom.language;
146         looseCollections = copyFrom.looseCollections;
147         namespaces = copyFrom.namespaces;
148         jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>(copyFrom.jenaSettings);
149      }
150
151      /**
152       * Copy constructor.
153       *
154       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
155       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
156       */
157      protected Builder(RdfSerializer copyFrom) {
158         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
159         addBeanTypesRdf = copyFrom.addBeanTypesRdf;
160         addLiteralTypes = copyFrom.addLiteralTypes;
161         addRootProperty = copyFrom.addRootProperty;
162         collectionFormat = copyFrom.collectionFormat;
163         disableAutoDetectNamespaces = ! copyFrom.autoDetectNamespaces;
164         disableUseXmlNamespaces = ! copyFrom.useXmlNamespaces;
165         juneauBpNs = copyFrom.juneauBpNs;
166         juneauNs = copyFrom.juneauNs;
167         language = copyFrom.language;
168         looseCollections = copyFrom.looseCollections;
169         namespaces = copyFrom.namespaces.length == 0 ? null : list(copyFrom.namespaces);
170         jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>(copyFrom.jenaSettings);
171      }
172
173      /**
174       * Add <js>"_type"</js> properties when needed.
175       *
176       * <p>
177       * If <jk>true</jk>, then <js>"_type"</js> properties will be added to beans if their type cannot be inferred
178       * through reflection.
179       *
180       * <p>
181       * When present, this value overrides the {@link org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer.Builder#addBeanTypes()} setting and is
182       * provided to customize the behavior of specific serializers in a {@link SerializerSet}.
183       *
184       * @return This object.
185       */
186      public SELF addBeanTypesRdf() {
187         return addBeanTypesRdf(true);
188      }
189
190      /**
191       * Same as {@link #addBeanTypesRdf()} but allows you to explicitly specify the value.
192       *
193       * @param value The value for this setting.
194       * @return This object.
195       */
196      public SELF addBeanTypesRdf(boolean value) {
197         addBeanTypesRdf = value;
198         return self();
199      }
200
201      /**
202       * Add XSI data types to non-<c>String</c> literals.
203       *
204       * <p>
205       * Shortcut for calling <code>addLiteralTypes(<jk>true</jk>)</code>.
206       *
207       * @return This object.
208       */
209      public SELF addLiteralTypes() {
210         return addLiteralTypes(true);
211      }
212
213      /**
214       * Add XSI data types to non-<c>String</c> literals.
215       *
216       * <p>
217       * Shortcut for calling <code>addLiteralTypes(<jk>true</jk>)</code>.
218       *
219       * @param value
220       *    The new value for this setting.
221       * @return This object.
222       */
223      public SELF addLiteralTypes(boolean value) {
224         addLiteralTypes = value;
225         return self();
226      }
227
228      /**
229       * Add RDF root identifier property to root node.
230       *
231       * <p>
232       * When enabled an RDF property <c>http://www.apache.org/juneau/root</c> is added with a value of <js>"true"</js>
233       * to identify the root node in the graph.
234       * <br>This helps locate the root node during parsing.
235       *
236       * <p>
237       * If disabled, the parser has to search through the model to find any resources without incoming predicates to
238       * identify root notes, which can introduce a considerable performance degradation.
239       *
240       * @return This object.
241       */
242      public SELF addRootProperty() {
243         return addRootProperty(true);
244      }
245
246      /**
247       * Add RDF root identifier property to root node.
248       *
249       * <p>
250       * When enabled an RDF property <c>http://www.apache.org/juneau/root</c> is added with a value of <js>"true"</js>
251       * to identify the root node in the graph.
252       * <br>This helps locate the root node during parsing.
253       *
254       * <p>
255       * If disabled, the parser has to search through the model to find any resources without incoming predicates to
256       * identify root notes, which can introduce a considerable performance degradation.
257       *
258       * @param value
259       *    The new value for this setting.
260       * @return This object.
261       */
262      public SELF addRootProperty(boolean value) {
263         addRootProperty = value;
264         return self();
265      }
266
267      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
268      public RdfSerializer build() {
269         return cache(CACHE).build(RdfSerializer.class);
270      }
271
272      /**
273       * RDF format for representing collections and arrays.
274       *
275       * <ul class='values'>
276       *    <li><js>"DEFAULT"</js> - Default format.  The default is an RDF Sequence container.
277       *    <li><js>"SEQ"</js> - RDF Sequence container.
278       *    <li><js>"BAG"</js> - RDF Bag container.
279       *    <li><js>"LIST"</js> - RDF List container.
280       *    <li><js>"MULTI_VALUED"</js> - Multi-valued properties.
281       * </ul>
282       *
283       * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
284       *    <li class='note'>
285       *       If you use <js>"BAG"</js> or <js>"MULTI_VALUED"</js>, the order of the elements in the collection will get
286       *       lost.
287       * </ul>
288       *
289       * @param value
290       *    The new value for this setting.
291       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
292       * @return This object.
293       */
294      public SELF collectionFormat(RdfCollectionFormat value) {
295         collectionFormat = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
296         return self();
297      }
298
299      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
300      public abstract SELF copy();
301
302      /**
303       * Disable auto-detect namespace usage.
304       *
305       * <p>
306       * Don't detect namespace usage before serialization.
307       *
308       * <p>
309       * If enabled, then the data structure will first be crawled looking for namespaces that will be encountered before
310       * the root element is serialized.
311       *
312       * @return This object.
313       */
314      public SELF disableAutoDetectNamespaces() {
315         return disableAutoDetectNamespaces(true);
316      }
317
318      /**
319       * Disable auto-detect namespace usage.
320       *
321       * <p>
322       * Don't detect namespace usage before serialization.
323       *
324       * <p>
325       * If enabled, then the data structure will first be crawled looking for namespaces that will be encountered before
326       * the root element is serialized.
327       *
328       * @param value
329       *    The new value for this setting.
330       * @return This object.
331       */
332      public SELF disableAutoDetectNamespaces(boolean value) {
333         disableAutoDetectNamespaces = value;
334         return self();
335      }
336
337      /**
338       * Disable reuse of XML namespaces when RDF namespaces not specified.
339       *
340       * <p>
341       * When enabled, namespaces defined using {@link XmlNs @XmlNs} and {@link Xml Xml} will not be
342       * inherited by the RDF serializers.
343       * Otherwise, namespaces will be defined using {@link RdfNs @RdfNs} and {@link Rdf @Rdf}.
344       *
345       * @return This object.
346       */
347      public SELF disableUseXmlNamespaces() {
348         return disableUseXmlNamespaces(true);
349      }
350
351      /**
352       * Disable reuse of XML namespaces when RDF namespaces not specified.
353       *
354       * <p>
355       * When enabled, namespaces defined using {@link XmlNs @XmlNs} and {@link Xml Xml} will not be
356       * inherited by the RDF serializers.
357       * Otherwise, namespaces will be defined using {@link RdfNs @RdfNs} and {@link Rdf @Rdf}.
358       *
359       * @param value
360       *    The new value for this setting.
361       * @return This object.
362       */
363      public SELF disableUseXmlNamespaces(boolean value) {
364         disableUseXmlNamespaces = value;
365         return self();
366      }
367
368      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
369      public HashKey hashKey() {
370         // @formatter:off
371         return HashKey.of(
372            super.hashKey(),
373            addBeanTypesRdf,
374            addLiteralTypes,
375            addRootProperty,
376            disableAutoDetectNamespaces,
377            disableUseXmlNamespaces,
378            looseCollections,
379            language,
380            collectionFormat,
381            juneauNs,
382            juneauBpNs,
383            namespaces,
384            jenaSettings
385         );
386         // @formatter:on
387      }
388
389      /**
390       * Default XML namespace for bean properties.
391       *
392       * @param value
393       *    The new value for this setting.
394       *    <br>The default is <code>{j:<js>'http://www.apache.org/juneaubp/'</js>}</code>.
395       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
396       * @return This object.
397       */
398      public SELF juneauBpNs(Namespace value) {
399         juneauBpNs = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
400         return self();
401      }
402
403      /**
404       * XML namespace for Juneau properties.
405       *
406       * @param value
407       *    The new value for this setting.
408       *    <br>The default is <code>{j:<js>'http://www.apache.org/juneau/'</js>}</code>.
409       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
410       * @return This object.
411       */
412      public SELF juneauNs(Namespace value) {
413         juneauNs = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
414         return self();
415      }
416
417      /**
418       * RDF language.
419       *
420       * <p>
421       * Can be any of the following:
422       * <ul class='spaced-list'>
423       *    <li>
424       *       <js>"RDF/XML"</js>
425       *    <li>
426       *       <js>"RDF/XML-ABBREV"</js> (default)
427       *    <li>
428       *       <js>"N-TRIPLE"</js>
429       *    <li>
430       *       <js>"N3"</js> - General name for the N3 writer.
431       *       Will make a decision on exactly which writer to use (pretty writer, plain writer or simple writer) when
432       *       created.
433       *       Default is the pretty writer but can be overridden with system property
434       *       <c>org.apache.jena.n3.N3JenaWriter.writer</c>.
435       *    <li>
436       *       <js>"N3-PP"</js> - Name of the N3 pretty writer.
437       *       The pretty writer uses a frame-like layout, with prefixing, clustering like properties and embedding
438       *       one-referenced bNodes.
439       *    <li>
440       *       <js>"N3-PLAIN"</js> - Name of the N3 plain writer.
441       *       The plain writer writes records by subject.
442       *    <li>
443       *       <js>"N3-TRIPLES"</js> - Name of the N3 triples writer.
444       *       This writer writes one line per statement, like N-Triples, but does N3-style prefixing.
445       *    <li>
446       *       <js>"TURTLE"</js> -  Turtle writer.
447       *       http://www.dajobe.org/2004/01/turtle/
448       * </ul>
449       *
450       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
451       *    <li class='jm'>{@link #n3()}
452       *    <li class='jm'>{@link #ntriple()}
453       *    <li class='jm'>{@link #turtle()}
454       *    <li class='jm'>{@link #xml()}
455       *    <li class='jm'>{@link #xmlabbrev()}
456       * </ul>
457       *
458       * @param value
459       *    The new value for this setting.
460       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
461       * @return This object.
462       */
463      public SELF language(String value) {
464         language = assertArgNotNull(ARG_value, value);
465         return self();
466      }
467
468      /**
469       * Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.
470       *
471       * <p>
472       * When specified, collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of
473       * resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).
474       *
475       * <p>
476       * Note that this setting is specialized for RDF syntax, and is incompatible with the concept of
477       * losslessly representing POJO models, since the tree structure of these POJO models are lost
478       * when serialized as loose collections.
479       *
480       * <p>
481       * This setting is typically only useful if the beans being parsed into do not have a bean property
482       * annotated with {@link Rdf#beanUri @Rdf(beanUri=true)}.
483       *
484       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
485       * <p class='bjava'>
486       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = RdfSerializer
487       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
488       *       .xmlabbrev()
489       *       .looseCollections()
490       *       .build();
491       *
492       *    ReaderParser <jv>parser</jv> = RdfParser
493       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
494       *       .xml()
495       *       .looseCollections()
496       *       .build();
497       *
498       *    List&lt;MyBean&gt; <jv>list</jv> = <jsm>createListOfMyBeans</jsm>();
499       *
500       *    <jc>// Serialize to RDF/XML as loose resources</jc>
501       *    String <jv>rdfXml</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>list</jv>);
502       *
503       *    <jc>// Parse back into a Java collection</jc>
504       *    <jv>list</jv> = <jv>parser</jv>.parse(<jv>rdfXml</jv>, LinkedList.<jk>class</jk>, MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);
505       *
506       *    MyBean[] <jv>beans</jv> = <jsm>createArrayOfMyBeans</jsm>();
507       *
508       *    <jc>// Serialize to RDF/XML as loose resources</jc>
509       *    <jv>rdfXml</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>beans</jv>);
510       *
511       *    <jc>// Parse back into a bean array</jc>
512       *    <jv>beans</jv> = <jv>parser</jv>.parse(<jv>rdfXml</jv>, MyBean[].<jk>class</jk>);
513       * </p>
514       *
515       * @return This object.
516       */
517      public SELF looseCollections() {
518         return looseCollections(true);
519      }
520
521      /**
522       * Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.
523       *
524       * <p>
525       * When specified, collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of
526       * resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).
527       *
528       * <p>
529       * Note that this setting is specialized for RDF syntax, and is incompatible with the concept of
530       * losslessly representing POJO models, since the tree structure of these POJO models are lost
531       * when serialized as loose collections.
532       *
533       * <p>
534       * This setting is typically only useful if the beans being parsed into do not have a bean property
535       * annotated with {@link Rdf#beanUri @Rdf(beanUri=true)}.
536       *
537       * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
538       * <p class='bjava'>
539       *    WriterSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = RdfSerializer
540       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
541       *       .xmlabbrev()
542       *       .looseCollections()
543       *       .build();
544       *
545       *    ReaderParser <jv>parser</jv> = RdfParser
546       *       .<jsm>create</jsm>()
547       *       .xml()
548       *       .looseCollections()
549       *       .build();
550       *
551       *    List&lt;MyBean&gt; <jv>list</jv> = <jsm>createListOfMyBeans</jsm>();
552       *
553       *    <jc>// Serialize to RDF/XML as loose resources</jc>
554       *    String <jv>rdfXml</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>list</jv>);
555       *
556       *    <jc>// Parse back into a Java collection</jc>
557       *    <jv>list</jv> = <jv>parser</jv>.parse(<jv>rdfXml</jv>, LinkedList.<jk>class</jk>, MyBean.<jk>class</jk>);
558       *
559       *    MyBean[] <jv>beans</jv> = <jsm>createArrayOfMyBeans</jsm>();
560       *
561       *    <jc>// Serialize to RDF/XML as loose resources</jc>
562       *    <jv>rdfXml</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>beans</jv>);
563       *
564       *    <jc>// Parse back into a bean array</jc>
565       *    <jv>beans</jv> = <jv>parser</jv>.parse(<jv>rdfXml</jv>, MyBean[].<jk>class</jk>);
566       * </p>
567       *
568       * @param value
569       *    The new value for this setting.
570       * @return This object.
571       */
572      public SELF looseCollections(boolean value) {
573         looseCollections = value;
574         return self();
575      }
576
577      /**
578       * RDF language.
579       *
580       * <p>
581       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_N3</jsf>)</code>
582       *
583       * @return This object.
584       */
585      public SELF n3() {
586         return language(Constants.LANG_N3);
587      }
588
589      /**
590       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableAbbrevBaseURI</c>.
591       *
592       * <p>
593       * Controls whether to use abbreviations <c>&lt;&gt;</c> or <c>&lt;#&gt;</c>.
594       *
595       * @return This object.
596       */
597      public SELF n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri() {
598         return n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri(true);
599      }
600
601      /**
602       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableAbbrevBaseURI</c>.
603       *
604       * <p>
605       * Controls whether to use abbreviations <c>&lt;&gt;</c> or <c>&lt;#&gt;</c>.
606       *
607       * @param value
608       *    The new value for this setting.
609       * @return This object.
610       */
611      public SELF n3_disableAbbrevBaseUri(boolean value) {
612         return jena("n3.disableAbbrevBaseUri", value);
613      }
614
615      /**
616       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableObjectLists</c>.
617       *
618       * <p>
619       * Don't print object lists as comma separated lists.
620       *
621       * @return This object.
622       */
623      public SELF n3_disableObjectLists() {
624         return n3_disableObjectLists(true);
625      }
626
627      /**
628       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableObjectLists</c>.
629       *
630       * <p>
631       * Don't print object lists as comma separated lists.
632       *
633       * @param value
634       *    The new value for this setting.
635       * @return This object.
636       */
637      public SELF n3_disableObjectLists(boolean value) {
638         return jena("n3.disableObjectLists", value);
639      }
640
641      /**
642       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUseDoubles</c>.
643       *
644       * <p>
645       * Disallow the use of doubles as <c>123.456</c>.
646       *
647       * @return This object.
648       */
649      public SELF n3_disableUseDoubles() {
650         return n3_disableUseDoubles(true);
651      }
652
653      /**
654       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUseDoubles</c>.
655       *
656       * <p>
657       * Disallow the use of doubles as <c>123.456</c>.
658       *
659       * @param value
660       *    The new value for this setting.
661       * @return This object.
662       */
663      public SELF n3_disableUseDoubles(boolean value) {
664         return jena("n3.disableUseDoubles", value);
665      }
666
667      /**
668       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUsePropertySymbols</c>.
669       *
670       * <p>
671       * Controls whether to use <c>a</c>, <c>=</c> and <c>=&gt;</c> in output
672       *
673       * @return This object.
674       */
675      public SELF n3_disableUsePropertySymbols() {
676         return n3_disableUsePropertySymbols(true);
677      }
678
679      /**
680       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUsePropertySymbols</c>.
681       *
682       * <p>
683       * Controls whether to use <c>a</c>, <c>=</c> and <c>=&gt;</c> in output
684       *
685       * @param value
686       *    The new value for this setting.
687       * @return This object.
688       */
689      public SELF n3_disableUsePropertySymbols(boolean value) {
690         return jena("n3.disableUsePropertySymbols", value);
691      }
692
693      /**
694       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUseTripleQuotedStrings</c>.
695       *
696       * <p>
697       * Disallow the use of <c>"""</c> to delimit long strings.
698       *
699       * @return This object.
700       */
701      public SELF n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings() {
702         return n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings(true);
703      }
704
705      /**
706       * N3/Turtle property: <c>disableUseTripleQuotedStrings</c>.
707       *
708       * <p>
709       * Disallow the use of <c>"""</c> to delimit long strings.
710       *
711       * @param value
712       *    The new value for this setting.
713       * @return This object.
714       */
715      public SELF n3_disableUseTripleQuotedStrings(boolean value) {
716         return jena("n3.disableUseTripleQuotedStrings", value);
717      }
718
719      /**
720       * N3/Turtle property: <c>indentProperty</c>.
721       *
722       * <p>
723       * Width to indent properties.
724       *
725       * @param value
726       *    The new value for this setting.
727       * @return This object.
728       */
729      public SELF n3_indentProperty(int value) {
730         return jena("n3.indentProperty", value);
731      }
732
733      /**
734       * N3/Turtle property: <c>minGap</c>.
735       *
736       * <p>
737       * Minimum gap between items on a line.
738       *
739       * @param value
740       *    The new value for this setting.
741       * @return This object.
742       */
743      public SELF n3_minGap(int value) {
744         return jena("n3.minGap", value);
745      }
746
747      /**
748       * N3/Turtle property: <c>propertyColumn</c>.
749       *
750       * <p>
751       * Width of the property column.
752       *
753       * @param value
754       *    The new value for this setting.
755       * @return This object.
756       */
757      public SELF n3_propertyColumn(int value) {
758         return jena("n3.propertyColumn", value);
759      }
760
761      /**
762       * N3/Turtle property: <c>subjectColumn</c>.
763       *
764       * <p>
765       * If the subject is shorter than this value, the first property may go on the same line.
766       *
767       * @param value
768       *    The new value for this setting.
769       * @return This object.
770       */
771      public SELF n3_subjectColumn(int value) {
772         return jena("n3.subjectColumn", value);
773      }
774
775      /**
776       * N3/Turtle property: <c>widePropertyLen</c>.
777       *
778       * <p>
779       * Width of the property column.
780       * Must be longer than <c>propertyColumn</c>.
781       *
782       * @param value
783       *    The new value for this setting.
784       * @return This object.
785       */
786      public SELF n3_widePropertyLen(int value) {
787         return jena("n3.widePropertyLen", value);
788      }
789
790      /**
791       * Default namespaces.
792       *
793       * <p>
794       * The default list of namespaces associated with this serializer.
795       *
796       * @param values The new value for this setting.
797       *    <br>Cannot contain <jk>null</jk> values (will throw {@link IllegalArgumentException}).
798       * @return This object.
799       */
800      public SELF namespaces(Namespace...values) {
801         assertArgNoNulls(ARG_values, values);
802         namespaces = addAll(namespaces, values);
803         return self();
804      }
805
806      /**
807       * RDF language.
808       *
809       * <p>
810       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_NTRIPLE</jsf>)</code>
811       *
812       * @return This object.
813       */
814      public SELF ntriple() {
815         return language(Constants.LANG_NTRIPLE);
816      }
817
818      /**
819       * RDF/XML property: <c>allowBadURIs</c>.
820       *
821       * <p>
822       * URIs in the graph are, by default, checked prior to serialization.
823       *
824       * @return This object.
825       */
826      public SELF rdfxml_allowBadUris() {
827         return rdfxml_allowBadUris(true);
828      }
829
830      /**
831       * RDF/XML property: <c>allowBadURIs</c>.
832       *
833       * <p>
834       * URIs in the graph are, by default, checked prior to serialization.
835       *
836       * @param value
837       *    The new value for this setting.
838       * @return This object.
839       */
840      public SELF rdfxml_allowBadUris(boolean value) {
841         return jena("rdfXml.allowBadURIs", value);
842      }
843
844      /**
845       * RDF/XML property: <c>attributeQuoteChar</c>.
846       *
847       * <p>
848       * The XML attribute quote character.
849       *
850       * @param value
851       *    The new value for this setting.
852       * @return This object.
853       */
854      public SELF rdfxml_attributeQuoteChar(char value) {
855         return jena("rdfXml.attributeQuoteChar", value);
856      }
857
858      /**
859       * RDF/XML property: <c>blockRules</c>.
860       *
861       * <p>
862       * A list of <c>Resource</c> or a <c>String</c> being a comma separated list of fragment IDs from
863       * {doc http://www.w3.org/TR/rdf-syntax-grammar RDF Syntax Grammar} indicating grammar
864       * rules that will not be used.
865       *
866       * @param value
867       *    The new value for this setting.
868       * @return This object.
869       */
870      public SELF rdfxml_blockRules(String value) {
871         return jena("rdfXml.blockRules", value);
872      }
873
874      /**
875       * RDF/XML property: <c>disableShowDoctypeDeclaration</c>.
876       *
877       * <p>
878       * If disabled, an XML doctype declaration isn't included in the output.
879       * This declaration includes a <c>!ENTITY</c> declaration for each prefix mapping in the model, and any
880       * attribute value that starts with the URI of that mapping is written as starting with the corresponding entity
881       * invocation.
882       *
883       * @return This object.
884       */
885      public SELF rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration() {
886         return rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration(true);
887      }
888
889      /**
890       * RDF/XML property: <c>disableShowDoctypeDeclaration</c>.
891       *
892       * <p>
893       * If disabled, an XML doctype declaration isn't included in the output.
894       * This declaration includes a <c>!ENTITY</c> declaration for each prefix mapping in the model, and any
895       * attribute value that starts with the URI of that mapping is written as starting with the corresponding entity
896       * invocation.
897       *
898       * @param value
899       *    The new value for this setting.
900       * @return This object.
901       */
902      public SELF rdfxml_disableShowDoctypeDeclaration(boolean value) {
903         return jena("rdfXml.disableShowDoctypeDeclaration", value);
904      }
905
906      /**
907       * RDF/XML ARP property: <c>error-mode</c>.
908       *
909       * <p>
910       * Sets ARP to look for RDF embedded within an enclosing XML document.
911       *
912       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
913       *    <li>
914       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setEmbedding(boolean) ARPOptions.setEmbedding(boolean)}
915       * </ul>
916       *
917       * @return This object.
918       */
919      public SELF rdfxml_embedding() {
920         return rdfxml_embedding(true);
921      }
922
923      /**
924       * RDF/XML ARP property: <c>error-mode</c>.
925       *
926       * <p>
927       * Sets ARP to look for RDF embedded within an enclosing XML document.
928       *
929       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
930       *    <li>
931       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setEmbedding(boolean) ARPOptions.setEmbedding(boolean)}
932       * </ul>
933       *
934       * @param value
935       *    The new value for this setting.
936       * @return This object.
937       */
938      public SELF rdfxml_embedding(boolean value) {
939         return jena("rdfXml.embedding", value);
940      }
941
942      /**
943       * RDF/XML ARP property: <c>error-mode</c>.
944       *
945       * <p>
946       * This allows a coarse-grained approach to control of error handling.
947       *
948       * <ul class='values'>
949       *    <li><js>"default"</js>
950       *    <li><js>"lax"</js>
951       *    <li><js>"strict"</js>
952       *    <li><js>"strict-ignore"</js>
953       *    <li><js>"strict-warning"</js>
954       *    <li><js>"strict-error"</js>
955       *    <li><js>"strict-fatal"</js>
956       * </ul>
957       *
958       * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
959       *    <li>
960       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setDefaultErrorMode() ARPOptions.setDefaultErrorMode()}
961       *    <li>
962       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setLaxErrorMode() ARPOptions.setLaxErrorMode()}
963       *    <li>
964       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setStrictErrorMode() ARPOptions.setStrictErrorMode()}
965       *    <li>
966       *       {doc ext.ARP/ARPOptions.html#setStrictErrorMode(int) ARPOptions.setStrictErrorMode(int)}
967       * </ul>
968       *
969       * @param value
970       *    The new value for this setting.
971       * @return This object.
972       */
973      public SELF rdfxml_errorMode(String value) {
974         return jena("rdfXml.error-mode", value);
975      }
976
977      /**
978       * RDF/XML property: <c>iri_rules</c>.
979       *
980       * <p>
981       * Set the engine for checking and resolving.
982       *
983       * <ul class='values spaced-list'>
984       *    <li>
985       *       <js>"lax"</js> - The rules for RDF URI references only, which does permit spaces although the use of spaces
986       *       is not good practice.
987       *    <li>
988       *       <js>"strict"</js> - Sets the IRI engine with rules for valid IRIs, XLink and RDF; it does not permit spaces
989       *       in IRIs.
990       *    <li>
991       *       <js>"iri"</js> - Sets the IRI engine to IRI
992       *       ({doc http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3986.txt RFC 3986},
993       *       {doc http://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3987.txt RFC 3987}).
994       * </ul>
995       *
996       * @param value
997       *    The new value for this setting.
998       * @return This object.
999       */
1000      public SELF rdfxml_iriRules(String value) {
1001         return jena("rdfXml.iri-rules", value);
1002      }
1003
1004      /**
1005       * RDF/XML property: <c>longId</c>.
1006       *
1007       * <p>
1008       * Whether to use long ID's for anon resources.
1009       * Short ID's are easier to read, but can run out of memory on very large models.
1010       *
1011       * @return This object.
1012       */
1013      public SELF rdfxml_longId() {
1014         return rdfxml_longId(true);
1015      }
1016
1017      /**
1018       * RDF/XML property: <c>longId</c>.
1019       *
1020       * <p>
1021       * Whether to use long ID's for anon resources.
1022       * Short ID's are easier to read, but can run out of memory on very large models.
1023       *
1024       * @param value
1025       *    The new value for this setting.
1026       * @return This object.
1027       */
1028      public SELF rdfxml_longId(boolean value) {
1029         return jena("rdfXml.longId", value);
1030      }
1031
1032      /**
1033       * RDF/XML property: <c>relativeURIs</c>.
1034       *
1035       * <p>
1036       * What sort of relative URIs should be used.
1037       *
1038       * <p>
1039       * A comma separate list of options:
1040       * <ul class='spaced-list'>
1041       *    <li>
1042       *       <js>"same-document"</js> - Same-document references (e.g. <js>""</js> or <js>"#foo"</js>)
1043       *    <li>
1044       *       <js>"network"</js>  - Network paths (e.g. <js>"//example.org/foo"</js> omitting the URI scheme)
1045       *    <li>
1046       *       <js>"absolute"</js> - Absolute paths (e.g. <js>"/foo"</js> omitting the scheme and authority)
1047       *    <li>
1048       *       <js>"relative"</js> - Relative path not beginning in <js>"../"</js>
1049       *    <li>
1050       *       <js>"parent"</js> - Relative path beginning in <js>"../"</js>
1051       *    <li>
1052       *       <js>"grandparent"</js> - Relative path beginning in <js>"../../"</js>
1053       * </ul>
1054       *
1055       * <p>
1056       * The default value is <js>"same-document, absolute, relative, parent"</js>.
1057       * To switch off relative URIs use the value <js>""</js>.
1058       * Relative URIs of any of these types are output where possible if and only if the option has been specified.
1059       *
1060       * @param value
1061       *    The new value for this setting.
1062       * @return This object.
1063       */
1064      public SELF rdfxml_relativeUris(String value) {
1065         return jena("rdfXml.relativeURIs", value);
1066      }
1067
1068      /**
1069       * RDF/XML property: <c>showXmlDeclaration</c>.
1070       *
1071       * <ul class='values spaced-list'>
1072       *    <li>
1073       *       <js>"true"</js> - Add XML Declaration to the output.
1074       *    <li>
1075       *       <js>"false"</js> - Don't add XML Declaration to the output.
1076       *    <li>
1077       *       <js>"default"</js> - Only add an XML Declaration when asked to write to an <c>OutputStreamWriter</c>
1078       *       that uses some encoding other than <c>UTF-8</c> or <c>UTF-16</c>.
1079       *       In this case the encoding is shown in the XML declaration.
1080       * </ul>
1081       *
1082       * @param value
1083       *    The new value for this setting.
1084       * @return This object.
1085       */
1086      public SELF rdfxml_showXmlDeclaration(String value) {
1087         return jena("rdfXml.showXmlDeclaration", value);
1088      }
1089
1090      /**
1091       * RDF/XML property: <c>tab</c>.
1092       *
1093       * <p>
1094       * The number of spaces with which to indent XML child elements.
1095       *
1096       * @param value
1097       *    The new value for this setting.
1098       * @return This object.
1099       */
1100      public SELF rdfxml_tab(int value) {
1101         return jena("rdfXml.tab", value);
1102      }
1103
1104      /**
1105       * RDF/XML property: <c>xmlbase</c>.
1106       *
1107       * <p>
1108       * The value to be included for an <xa>xml:base</xa> attribute on the root element in the file.
1109       *
1110       * @param value
1111       *    The new value for this setting.
1112       * @return This object.
1113       */
1114      public SELF rdfxml_xmlbase(String value) {
1115         return jena("rdfXml.xmlbase", value);
1116      }
1117
1118      /**
1119       * RDF language.
1120       *
1121       * <p>
1122       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_TURTLE</jsf>)</code>
1123       *
1124       * @return This object.
1125       */
1126      public SELF turtle() {
1127         return language(Constants.LANG_TURTLE);
1128      }
1129
1130      /**
1131       * RDF language.
1132       *
1133       * <p>
1134       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_JSONLD</jsf>)</code>
1135       *
1136       * @return This object.
1137       */
1138      public SELF jsonLd() {
1139         return language(Constants.LANG_JSONLD);
1140      }
1141
1142      /**
1143       * RDF language.
1144       *
1145       * <p>
1146       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_NQUADS</jsf>)</code>
1147       *
1148       * @return This object.
1149       */
1150      public SELF nQuads() {
1151         return language(Constants.LANG_NQUADS);
1152      }
1153
1154      /**
1155       * RDF language.
1156       *
1157       * <p>
1158       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_TRIG</jsf>)</code>
1159       *
1160       * @return This object.
1161       */
1162      public SELF triG() {
1163         return language(Constants.LANG_TRIG);
1164      }
1165
1166      /**
1167       * RDF language.
1168       *
1169       * <p>
1170       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_TRIX</jsf>)</code>
1171       *
1172       * @return This object.
1173       */
1174      public SELF triX() {
1175         return language(Constants.LANG_TRIX);
1176      }
1177
1178      /**
1179       * RDF language.
1180       *
1181       * <p>
1182       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_RDFJSON</jsf>)</code>
1183       *
1184       * @return This object.
1185       */
1186      public SELF rdfJson() {
1187         return language(Constants.LANG_RDFJSON);
1188      }
1189
1190
1191      /**
1192       * RDF language.
1193       *
1194       * <p>
1195       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_RDF_XML</jsf>)</code>
1196       *
1197       * @return This object.
1198       */
1199      public SELF xml() {
1200         return language(Constants.LANG_RDF_XML);
1201      }
1202
1203      /**
1204       * RDF language.
1205       *
1206       * <p>
1207       * Shortcut for calling <code>language(<jsf>LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV</jsf>)</code>
1208       *
1209       * @return This object.
1210       */
1211      public SELF xmlabbrev() {
1212         return language(Constants.LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV);
1213      }
1214
1215      SELF jena(String key, Object value) {
1216         jenaSettings.put(key, value);
1217         return self();
1218      }
1219   }
1220
1221   /**
1222    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link RdfSerializer#create()} / {@link RdfSerializer#copy()} path.
1223    */
1224   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
1225
1226      DefaultBuilder() {}
1227
1228      DefaultBuilder(RdfSerializer copyFrom) {
1229         super(copyFrom);
1230      }
1231
1232      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
1233         super(copyFrom);
1234      }
1235
1236      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
1237      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
1238         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
1239      }
1240   }
1241
1242   private static final Namespace[] EMPTY_NAMESPACE_ARRAY = new Namespace[0];
1243
1244   /**
1245    * Creates a new builder for this object.
1246    *
1247    * @return A new builder.
1248    */
1249   @SuppressWarnings({
1250      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
1251   })
1252   public static Builder<?> create() {
1253      return new DefaultBuilder();
1254   }
1255
1256   private static String getAccept(Builder<?> builder) {
1257      if (nn(builder.getAccept()))
1258         return builder.getAccept();
1259      return switch (builder.language) {
1260         case "RDF/XML" -> "text/xml+rdf+abbrev";
1261         case LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV -> "text/xml+rdf+abbrev,text/xml+rdf;q=0.9";
1262         case "N-TRIPLE" -> "text/n-triple";
1263         case "N3" -> "text/n3";
1264         case "N3-PP" -> "text/n3-pp";
1265         case "N3-PLAIN" -> "text/n3-plain";
1266         case "N3-TRIPLES" -> "text/n3-triples";
1267         case "TURTLE" -> "text/turtle";
1268         case "JSON-LD" -> "application/ld+json";
1269         case "N-QUADS" -> "application/n-quads";
1270         case "TRIG" -> "application/trig";
1271         case "TRIX" -> "application/trix+xml";
1272         case "RDF/JSON" -> "application/rdf+json";
1273         default -> MT_TEXT_XML_RDF;
1274      };
1275   }
1276
1277   private static String getProduces(Builder<?> builder) {
1278      if (nn(builder.getProduces()))
1279         return builder.getProduces();
1280      return switch (builder.language) {
1281         case "RDF/XML" -> "text/xml+rdf+abbrev";
1282         case LANG_RDF_XML_ABBREV -> MT_TEXT_XML_RDF;
1283         case "N-TRIPLE" -> "text/n-triple";
1284         case "N3" -> "text/n3";
1285         case "N3-PP" -> "text/n3-pp";
1286         case "N3-PLAIN" -> "text/n3-plain";
1287         case "N3-TRIPLES" -> "text/n3-triples";
1288         case "TURTLE" -> "text/turtle";
1289         case "JSON-LD" -> "application/ld+json";
1290         case "N-QUADS" -> "application/n-quads";
1291         case "TRIG" -> "application/trig";
1292         case "TRIX" -> "application/trix+xml";
1293         case "RDF/JSON" -> "application/rdf+json";
1294         default -> MT_TEXT_XML_RDF;
1295      };
1296   }
1297
1298   protected final boolean addBeanTypesRdf;
1299   protected final boolean addLiteralTypes;
1300   protected final boolean addRootProperty;
1301   protected final boolean autoDetectNamespaces;
1302   protected final boolean looseCollections;
1303   protected final boolean useXmlNamespaces;
1304   protected final Namespace juneauBpNs;
1305   protected final Namespace juneauNs;
1306   protected final RdfCollectionFormat collectionFormat;
1307   protected final String language;
1308
1309   final Map<String,Object> jenaSettings;
1310   final Namespace[] namespaces;
1311   private final boolean addBeanTypesEffective;
1312   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,RdfClassMeta> rdfClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1313
1314   private final Map<BeanMeta<?>,RdfBeanMeta> rdfBeanMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1315   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,RdfBeanPropertyMeta> rdfBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1316   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,XmlClassMeta> xmlClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1317
1318   private final Map<BeanMeta<?>,XmlBeanMeta> xmlBeanMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1319
1320   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,XmlBeanPropertyMeta> xmlBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
1321
1322   /**
1323    * Constructor.
1324    *
1325    * @param builder
1326    *    The builder for this object.
1327    */
1328   public RdfSerializer(Builder<?> builder) {
1329      super(builder.produces(getProduces(builder)).accept(getAccept(builder)));
1330      addLiteralTypes = builder.addLiteralTypes;
1331      addRootProperty = builder.addRootProperty;
1332      useXmlNamespaces = ! builder.disableUseXmlNamespaces;
1333      looseCollections = builder.looseCollections;
1334      autoDetectNamespaces = ! builder.disableAutoDetectNamespaces;
1335      language = builder.language;
1336      juneauNs = builder.juneauNs;
1337      juneauBpNs = builder.juneauBpNs;
1338      collectionFormat = builder.collectionFormat;
1339      namespaces = nn(builder.namespaces) ? builder.namespaces.toArray(EMPTY_NAMESPACE_ARRAY) : EMPTY_NAMESPACE_ARRAY;
1340      addBeanTypesRdf = builder.addBeanTypesRdf;
1341      jenaSettings = new TreeMap<>(builder.jenaSettings);
1342
1343      addBeanTypesEffective = addBeanTypesRdf || super.isAddBeanTypes();
1344   }
1345
1346   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
1347   public Builder<?> copy() {
1348      return new DefaultBuilder(this);
1349   }
1350
1351   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
1352   public RdfSerializerSession.Builder createSession() {
1353      return RdfSerializerSession.create(this);
1354   }
1355
1356   /**
1357    * Default namespaces.
1358    *
1359    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#namespaces(Namespace...)
1360    * @return
1361    *    The default list of namespaces associated with this serializer.
1362    */
1363   public Namespace[] getNamespaces() { return namespaces; }
1364
1365   @Override /* Overridden from RdfMetaProvider */
1366   public RdfBeanMeta getRdfBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
1367      return rdfBeanMetas.computeIfAbsent(bm, k -> new RdfBeanMeta(k, this));
1368   }
1369
1370   @Override /* Overridden from RdfMetaProvider */
1371   public RdfBeanPropertyMeta getRdfBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
1372      return rdfBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new RdfBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
1373   }
1374
1375   @Override /* Overridden from RdfMetaProvider */
1376   public RdfClassMeta getRdfClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
1377      return rdfClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new RdfClassMeta(k, this));
1378   }
1379
1380   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
1381   public RdfSerializerSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
1382
1383   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
1384   public XmlBeanMeta getXmlBeanMeta(BeanMeta<?> bm) {
1385      return xmlBeanMetas.computeIfAbsent(bm, k -> new XmlBeanMeta(k, this));
1386   }
1387
1388   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
1389   public XmlBeanPropertyMeta getXmlBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
1390      return xmlBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new XmlBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
1391   }
1392
1393   @Override /* Overridden from XmlMetaProvider */
1394   public XmlClassMeta getXmlClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
1395      return xmlClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new XmlClassMeta(k, this));
1396   }
1397
1398   /**
1399    * RDF format for representing collections and arrays.
1400    *
1401    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#collectionFormat(RdfCollectionFormat)
1402    * @return
1403    *    RDF format for representing collections and arrays.
1404    */
1405   protected final RdfCollectionFormat getCollectionFormat() { return collectionFormat; }
1406
1407   /**
1408    * All Jena-related configuration properties.
1409    *
1410    * @return
1411    *    A map of all Jena-related configuration properties.
1412    */
1413   protected final Map<String,Object> getJenaSettings() { return jenaSettings; }
1414
1415   /**
1416    * Default XML namespace for bean properties.
1417    *
1418    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#juneauBpNs(Namespace)
1419    * @return
1420    *    The XML namespace to use for bean properties.
1421    */
1422   protected final Namespace getJuneauBpNs() { return juneauBpNs; }
1423
1424   /**
1425    * XML namespace for Juneau properties.
1426    *
1427    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#juneauNs(Namespace)
1428    * @return
1429    *    The XML namespace to use for Juneau properties.
1430    */
1431   protected final Namespace getJuneauNs() { return juneauNs; }
1432
1433   /**
1434    * RDF language.
1435    *
1436    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#language(String)
1437    * @return
1438    *    The RDF language to use.
1439    */
1440   protected final String getLanguage() { return language; }
1441
1442   /**
1443    * Add <js>"_type"</js> properties when needed.
1444    *
1445    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#addBeanTypes()
1446    * @return
1447    *    <jk>true</jk> if <js>"_type"</js> properties will be added to beans if their type cannot be inferred
1448    *    through reflection.
1449    */
1450   @Override
1451   protected final boolean isAddBeanTypes() { return addBeanTypesEffective; }
1452
1453   /**
1454    * Add XSI data types to non-<c>String</c> literals.
1455    *
1456    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#addLiteralTypes()
1457    * @return
1458    *    <jk>true</jk> if XSI data types should be added to string literals.
1459    */
1460   protected final boolean isAddLiteralTypes() { return addLiteralTypes; }
1461
1462   /**
1463    * Add RDF root identifier property to root node.
1464    *
1465    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#addRootProperty()
1466    * @return
1467    *    <jk>true</jk> if RDF property <c>http://www.apache.org/juneau/root</c> is added with a value of <js>"true"</js>
1468    *    to identify the root node in the graph.
1469    */
1470   protected final boolean isAddRootProp() { return addRootProperty; }
1471
1472   /**
1473    * Auto-detect namespace usage.
1474    *
1475    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#disableAutoDetectNamespaces()
1476    * @return
1477    *    <jk>true</jk> if namespaces usage should be detected before serialization.
1478    */
1479   protected final boolean isAutoDetectNamespaces() { return autoDetectNamespaces; }
1480
1481   /**
1482    * Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.
1483    *
1484    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#looseCollections()
1485    * @return
1486    *    <jk>true</jk> if collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of
1487    *    resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).
1488    */
1489   protected final boolean isLooseCollections() { return looseCollections; }
1490
1491   /**
1492    * Reuse XML namespaces when RDF namespaces not specified.
1493    *
1494    * @see RdfSerializer.Builder#disableUseXmlNamespaces()
1495    * @return
1496    *    <jk>true</jk> if namespaces defined using {@link XmlNs @XmlNs} and {@link Xml @Xml} will be inherited by the RDF serializers.
1497    *    <br>Otherwise, namespaces will be defined using {@link RdfNs @RdfNs} and {@link Rdf @Rdf}.
1498    */
1499   protected final boolean isUseXmlNamespaces() { return useXmlNamespaces; }
1500
1501   @Override /* Overridden from WriterSerializer */
1502   protected FluentMap<String,Object> properties() {
1503      return super.properties()
1504         .a(PROP_addBeanTypes, addBeanTypes)
1505         .a(PROP_addLiteralTypes, addLiteralTypes)
1506         .a(PROP_addRootProperty, addRootProperty)
1507         .a(PROP_autoDetectNamespaces, autoDetectNamespaces)
1508         .a(PROP_collectionFormat, collectionFormat)
1509         .a(PROP_juneauBpNs, juneauBpNs)
1510         .a(PROP_juneauNs, juneauNs)
1511         .a(PROP_language, language)
1512         .a(PROP_looseCollections, looseCollections)
1513         .a(PROP_namespaces, namespaces)
1514         .a(PROP_useXmlNamespaces, useXmlNamespaces);
1515   }
1516}
